_mode_doc: Operating mode locked to fresh-generate. Decision: 2026-05-04. Skills call Canva:generate-design each run with the brand kit applied; no master templates pursued. Rationale: the registered-master path requires a duplicate-design API (Canva MCP doesn't expose one), plus per-slot element discovery and page mapping — too much added complexity for the marginal consistency gain. Revisit only if multiple weeks of fresh-generate output are visibly inconsistent.

theme_signature._doc: The visual theme captured from the W19 Friday draft (DAHIsVAwhso) which Jeff approved as the locked look. Generation prompts encode these layout details so future weeks match. Color and font choices come from the brand kit (kAGdeHDeWjQ) automatically.
theme_signature.background: Black dominant, with brand-kit decorative organic shapes (tan/beige blob accents in opposing corners)
theme_signature.headline_style: Large serif font, white, multi-line, top-left placement, takes up roughly the upper-left quadrant of the frame
theme_signature.body_text_style: Sans-serif, white, smaller, centered, near the bottom edge
theme_signature.hero_media_treatment: Framed window in the center of the frame (not full-bleed) — gives breathing room for headline above and tagline below
theme_signature.layout_pattern_4_5: Headline top-left | Hero photo center | Tagline bottom-center | Decorative shapes in upper-right and lower-left corners
theme_signature.reference_design: DAHIsVAwhso (Friday W19 draft, the look Jeff approved)

brand_kit_doc.title: Cobrinha LA Brand Kit
brand_kit_doc.role: Visual brand documentation: colors, fonts, logo rules

mood_board.title: Cobrinha LA
mood_board.role: Style/aesthetic reference for the LA brand voice

01-tue-adult-training-videos.name: ACL-Adult-Reel-Master
01-tue-adult-training-videos.generation_prompt: Vertical Instagram Reel/Story (9:16, 1080x1920) for Alliance Cobrinha LA — a Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu academy in Los Angeles led by world champion Rubens Cobrinha Charles. Tuesday Technical Masterclass Reel — adult audience, world-class technical jiu-jitsu standards. LAYOUT (lock to this pattern): Black background dominant. Large serif headline in white, top portion of the frame, multi-line if needed (placeholder 'TECHNIQUE NAME'). Smaller sans-serif subtitle below it (placeholder 'WITH PROF. COBRINHA'). Hero video footage in a framed window in the center of the frame, NOT full-bleed — leave breathing room above for the headline and below for a tagline. Bottom of frame: small sans-serif tagline, white, centered (placeholder 'ALLIANCE COBRINHA LA'). Decorative organic blob shapes from the brand kit in opposing corners (upper-right and lower-left) for visual signature. THEME ANCHOR: match the established Alliance Cobrinha LA visual signature — black + brand-kit tan/beige organic accents + serif headlines + sans-serif body. Restrained, magazine-editorial feel, never busy.

02-thu-kids-images.name: ACL-Kids-Carousel-Master
02-thu-kids-images.generation_prompt: Instagram carousel cover slide (1080x1350, 4:5 portrait) for Alliance Cobrinha LA. Thursday Confidence Building Carousel — kids program, parent-facing audience. LAYOUT (lock to this pattern): Black background dominant. Large serif headline in white, top-left placement, multi-line, occupying the upper portion (placeholder 'CONFIDENCE STARTS ON THE MAT'). Hero photo of a kid jiu-jitsu moment in a framed window in the center of the frame, NOT full-bleed. Smaller sans-serif tagline at the bottom, centered, white (placeholder 'KIDS BJJ — AGES 4-12'). Decorative brand-kit organic blob shapes (tan/beige) in opposing corners (upper-right and lower-left). THEME ANCHOR: match the established Alliance Cobrinha LA visual signature — black + tan/beige organic accents + serif headlines + sans-serif body. Slightly warmer than adult content but stay parent-facing serious, never cartoonish. Emphasize trust through the editorial feel.

03-fri-adult-images.name: ACL-Adult-Photo-Master
03-fri-adult-images.generation_prompt: Single Instagram photo post (1080x1350, 4:5 portrait) for Alliance Cobrinha LA. Friday Lifestyle/Community Photo — adult audience. LAYOUT (lock exactly to this pattern — proven look from week 19): Black background dominant. Large serif headline 'ONE TEAM. ONE STANDARD.' in white, placed top-left, takes up the upper-left quadrant of the frame, broken across multiple lines. Hero photo (community/lifestyle/competition shot) in a framed window in the center of the frame, NOT full-bleed — roughly 540x590px in the center area. Smaller sans-serif tagline near the bottom, centered, white (a short reflective line about community or progress). Decorative brand-kit organic blob shapes (tan/beige) in opposing corners — upper-right and lower-left. THEME ANCHOR: this is the established Alliance Cobrinha LA visual signature — black + tan/beige organic accents + large serif headlines + small sans-serif body text. Magazine-editorial quiet, not ad-copy loud. The community moment carries the frame inside the photo window.

04-sat-kids-training-videos.name: ACL-Kids-Reel-Master
04-sat-kids-training-videos.generation_prompt: Vertical Instagram Reel/Story (9:16, 1080x1920) for Alliance Cobrinha LA. Saturday Summer Camp Action Reel — kids program, parent-facing audience. LAYOUT (lock to this pattern): Black background dominant. Large serif headline in white, top of the frame, multi-line if needed (placeholder 'THE BEST SUMMER SKILL'). Smaller sans-serif subtitle below (placeholder 'KIDS BJJ SUMMER CAMP'). Hero video of kids in action (drilling, sparring, summer camp activities) in a framed window in the center of the frame, NOT full-bleed. Bottom of frame: small sans-serif CTA, white, centered (placeholder 'ALLIANCE COBRINHA LA — ENROLL NOW'). Decorative brand-kit organic blob shapes (tan/beige) in opposing corners. THEME ANCHOR: match the established Alliance Cobrinha LA visual signature — black + tan/beige organic accents + serif headlines + sans-serif body. Slightly higher energy than adult Tuesday reel — joy, action, group fun — but stay editorial, not cartoonish.
